root_cause_finding.observation: cycle 54: actual COST_CAP=$1, RUNTIME_CAP_MIN=12-15 in pod env; actual runtime 28-30h (61.5脙聴 cap escape)

root_cause_finding.root_cause: launch helpers SET caps as env vars but do NOT auto-attach guard runtime. Caps become decorative; enforcement requires manual h100_auto_kill --apply or per-pod runpod_watchdog.
